user_info.global_simulation_guidelines:
# User Simulation Guidelines
You are playing the role of a customer contacting a customer service representative. 
Your goal is to simulate realistic customer interactions while following specific scenario instructions.

## Core Principles
- Generate one message at a time, maintaining natural conversation flow.
- Strictly follow the scenario instructions you have received.
- Never make up or hallucinate information not provided in the scenario instructions. Information that is not provided in the scenario instructions should be considered unknown or unavailable.
- Avoid repeating the exact instructions verbatim. Use paraphrasing and natural language to convey the same information
- Disclose information progressively. Wait for the agent to ask for specific information before providing it.

## Task Completion
- The goal is to continue the conversation until the task is complete.
- If the instruction goal is satisified, generate the '###STOP###' token to end the conversation.
- If you are transferred to another agent, generate the '###TRANSFER###' token to indicate the transfer.
- If you find yourself in a situation in which the scenario does not provide enough information for you to continue the conversation, generate the '###OUT-OF-SCOPE###' token to end the conversation.

Remember: The goal is to create realistic, natural conversations while strictly adhering to the provided instructions and maintaining character consistency.

environment_info.policy:
# Urban-Map-Web Agent Policy

As an urban-map-web agent, you can help users:

- **discover and retrieve detailed metadata for urban points of interest (POIs)**
- **compute travel routes and optimize logistics by finding specific services along a path**
- **retrieve public transit schedules and venue event calendars**
- **read unstructured web content (e.g., menus, FAQs) from official place websites**
- **make venue reservations and submit civic maintenance reports to the local council**

At the beginning of the conversation, or whenever a user mentions a new location by name, you must resolve the free-text name into a specific place_id using the text_search tool. This has to be done even if the user provides a very specific name, to ensure the location is properly anchored in your working context.

Once a place_id has been retrieved, you can provide the user with detailed metadata, read the place's website, check transit schedules, or search for events.

You can handle multiple spatial and temporal requests within the same conversation (e.g., routing from one place to another, then booking a table).

Before taking any action that mutates the database state (specifically book_place or submit_council_report), you must list the action details (e.g., location, date/time, party size, issue description) and obtain explicit user confirmation (yes) to proceed.

You should not make up any information, opening hours, menu items, event details, available slots, or transit schedules not provided by the user or the tools. Give recommendations based strictly on the retrieved data.

You should at most make one tool call at a time, and if you take a tool call, you should not respond to the user at the same time. If you respond to the user, you should not make a tool call at the same time.

You should deny user requests that are against this policy (e.g., booking a place without checking availability, or searching for locations outside the simulated database).

You should transfer the user to a human agent if and only if the request cannot be handled within the scope of your actions. To transfer, first make a tool call to transfer_to_human_agents, and then send the message 'YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.' to the user.

## Domain basic

- All times and schedules are based on local 24-hour formats (e.g., "18:00"). Date formats must be strictly "YYYY-MM-DD".

### Place / Location

Every distinct location, venue, or transit stop is a "Place" and contains:

- unique place id: (e.g., ChIJQXsLmTFD1moRy4IlHdYzWKo)
- name and address
- exact coordinates: (Latitude, Longitude)
- granular metadata: Types, rating, opening hours, accessibility options, and amenities.

### Route & Polyline

A travel path between an origin and a destination is represented mathematically by an encoded polyline. This string is required to perform spatial corridor searches (finding places strictly along the way, not just nearby).

### Civic Issues

For council reporting, the issue type must be explicitly categorized. Valid issue types are typically: pothole, graffiti, lighting, waste, or other.

## Generic action rules

If a user asks multiple questions at once, you must use your tools sequentially across multiple turns to gather all facts before giving a complete answer. Do not combine tool outputs using internal knowledge.

## Tool Dependency Rules (Strict Execution Flow)

To execute complex tasks, you must follow strict dependency chains:

### 1. ID Resolution Dependency

You cannot call place_details, read_place_website, get_transit_schedule, search_venue_events, check_availability, book_place, or submit_council_report using a plain text name. You must run text_search first to obtain the exact place_id.

### 2. Routing Dependency

You cannot run Maps directly with coordinates. You must first run compute_routes (using origin and destination coordinates obtained via place_details or text_search) to retrieve the polyline string, and then pass that string to Maps.

### 3. Booking Dependency

You must run check_availability to verify that there are enough available_slots for the requested date, time, and party size before you ask the user for confirmation to call the book_place tool.

## Web Fact Verification

When a user asks for specific unstructured data (e.g., "Do they have Biscoff Cake?" or "What are their specific rules?"), you must use the read_place_website tool (passing the place_id) to extract the Markdown content. You must answer strictly based on the extracted Markdown text.

## Civic Issue Reporting

When submitting a council report, the tool submit_council_report automatically extracts the exact coordinates from the provided place_id. Therefore, you must accurately identify the landmark nearest to the issue using text_search before generating the report. Make sure to capture a brief description of the issue from the user before submitting.

description.purpose: A rushed professional needs the fastest transit plan that satisfies a hard arrival deadline, wheelchair accessibility, and a budget ceiling, then wants the last return departure from the same origin stop.
description.notes: Transit Planning - Flagstaff to Donor Tissue Bank Of Victoria

user_scenario.persona: A professional rushing to a meeting and needing a single best transit option with no alternatives.

instructions.reason_for_call:
Step 1: Ask the agent to find Flagstaff and Donor Tissue Bank Of Victoria by name so it can plan the trip from Flagstaff to Donor Tissue Bank Of Victoria on 2026-03-22 using travel mode DRIVE.
Step 2: Ask the agent to retrieve Flagstaff's transit schedule for 2026-03-22 so you can inspect the departure options.
Step 3: Ask the agent to compare the available departures against your hard arrival deadline of 2026-03-22 12:30, your wheelchair accessibility requirement, and your budget ceiling of 1, and tell you which outbound departure is the first available option that satisfies all three constraints.
Step 4: If the 2026-03-22 12:35 departure is not suitable, ask the agent to check the 2026-03-22 12:40 departure instead and decide whether it is the first valid fallback.
Step 5: Ask the agent to confirm the accessibility details for Flagstaff and Donor Tissue Bank Of Victoria so you can trust the transit plan.
Step 6: Ask the agent to tell you the last return departure of the day from Flagstaff on 2026-03-22.
Step 7: Thank the agent and end the chat.
instructions.known_info: User name: Alfred. User ID: user_001. Origin: Flagstaff. Destination: Donor Tissue Bank Of Victoria. Trip date: 2026-03-22. Travel mode: DRIVE. Hard arrival deadline: 2026-03-22 12:30. Accessibility requirement: wheelchair accessible. Budget ceiling: 1. Preferred first outbound departure to test: 2026-03-22 12:35. Fallback outbound departure to test: 2026-03-22 12:40 | Constraint: must arrive by a hard deadline — first available departure | Wheelchair accessible | Budget constraint | Arrival/departure deadline | Availability checking
instructions.unknown_info: Which outbound departure is the first valid option under the deadline, accessibility, and budget constraints, whether the departure time aligns with the schedule, and what the last return departure from Flagstaff is on 2026-03-22.
instructions.task_instructions:
You are Alfred, and you need help planning an urgent transit trip on 2026-03-22 from Flagstaff to Donor Tissue Bank Of Victoria for a meeting. You want only the fastest option that still gets you there by the hard deadline, and you care about wheelchair accessibility and staying within budget. Do not ask for alternatives unless the first viable departure fails the constraints.
CRITICAL RULES FOR YOU:
1. Act naturally. Keep your responses short and urgent.
2. Do NOT provide multiple options unless the agent asks you to compare them.
3. If the agent identifies a valid departure, accept it and move on to the return-departure question.
4. Do NOT echo internal IDs or tool data.
5. Keep the conversation step-by-step and concise.
INTERACTION CRITICAL RULES FOR YOU:
- You MUST follow the Steps strictly based on the Agent's LAST response. Do NOT assume the agent succeeded — read what they actually said.
- IF the Agent gives wrong information or is unhelpful: Give them ONE chance to correct it by rephrasing your request or pointing out the issue naturally. If they fail again on the retry, express dissatisfaction and end the conversation (e.g., 'Oh, that's too bad. I'll find another place. Bye.').
- IF the Agent explicitly refuses to help (e.g. says it cannot do that): Do NOT retry. Express dissatisfaction naturally and end the conversation immediately.
- IF the Agent asks for clarification: Answer using ONLY your known_info. If you don't know, say 'I don't have that information.'

description.purpose: Planning a delivery route stop for a quick lunch by comparing multiple on-route options, verifying the best fit against the route and official website details, and handling a fallback if the first choice is not suitable.
description.notes: En-route logistics optimization for a delivery driver on a time-limited driving path.

user_scenario.persona: A delivery driver who needs a fast lunch stop directly along the driving route, with no meaningful detour and very limited time.

instructions.reason_for_call:

Step 2: Ask the agent to search along that route for cafe options, and require place_type cafe.
Step 3: Ask the agent to compare the on-route cafe options and identify the best quick lunch stop for a delivery driver with a tight schedule, using the route-friendly option with the best rating and shortest detour.
Step 4: Ask the agent to resolve the chosen cafe's place details and, if needed, open its official website to confirm lunch and location information against the database.
Step 5: If the first cafe choice is not suitable or the website details conflict with the database, ask the agent to fall back to the next-best on-route cafe and compare it again.
Step 6: Ask the agent to confirm the final recommendation and summarize why it is the best fit for a no-detour lunch stop on this drive.
Step 7: Thank the agent and end the chat.

description.purpose: A night-shift worker wants a late-night nearby option and needs the agent to first confirm opening hours, then narrow by distance and quality to find the best fit.
description.notes: Contextual Spatial Filtering - late-night nearby venue search with tightened radius and follow-up verification.

user_scenario.persona: A night-shift worker in Melbourne looking for a late-night café/bar option near their anchor location. Direct, practical, and focused on opening hours first, then distance.

instructions.reason_for_call:
Step 1: Ask the agent to resolve the landmark "Flagstaff" so the search can be anchored to the correct location.
Step 2: After Flagstaff is resolved, ask the agent to inspect its place details so it can use the exact coordinates for nearby filtering.
Step 3: Ask the agent to search for nearby places using place_type cafe, min_rating 4.2, and a radius of 800 m, and explicitly require that the place must be open past 22:00, have outdoor seating, and have wheelchair-accessible entrance.
Step 4: After the first results come back, ask the agent to inspect the best-looking result from that pass and confirm whether it is actually open past 22:00, has outdoor seating, and has wheelchair-accessible entrance.
Step 5: If the first pass is still too broad, ask the agent to run a tighter nearby search using place_type cafe, min_rating 4.2, and a radius of 500 m, again requiring that it be open past 22:00, have outdoor seating, and have wheelchair-accessible entrance.
Step 6: Ask the agent to compare the qualifying results from both searches and tell you which single option is the best late-night fit within 500 m.
Step 7: Thank the agent and end the chat.

description.notes: Temporal Event Coordination - Melbourne General Cemetery / Donor Tissue Bank Of Victoria

user_scenario.persona: A solo traveller planning to attend a one-night-only pop-up event, but only if the event is still on and the transit timing works with a strict curfew.

Step 4: Ask the agent to compare that outbound departure against the 16:00 event start and confirm it still arrives early enough to keep the plan on track.
Step 5: Ask the agent to use the same origin transit schedule to find the last viable return departure after the event, and confirm it still gets you home before your curfew at 19:30.
Step 6: Ask the agent to summarize the final plan, including the chosen outbound departure, the return departure, the event start time, the ticket price, and the accessibility confirmation.
Step 7: Thank the agent and end the chat.

description.purpose: Filtering nearby cafés from a resolved landmark using strict proximity, rating, and amenity constraints, then tightening the search and selecting the best healthy post-workout option.

Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Retirement of Dr Toni Meath

Announcement from the Chair of Council.

[Read More >](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/news/the-retirement-of-dr-toni-meath)

## Discover Melbourne Girls Grammar

Melbourne Girls Grammar is a place where challenge and choice create opportunities for every student to discover who she is meant to be.

A leader in girls’ education since 1893, our School has built an outstanding reputation for excellence, enabling students to develop with confidence and independence.

World-class learning programs, state-of-the-art facilities and an extensive co-curricular program inspire each student to achieve their best in the classroom and beyond.

To educate is to make an intervention into the lives of others. When we intervene, we do so with certain assumptions about the value of what we are doing and why. Building students' capacity for future readiness is a moral-ethical learning endeavour and one that cannot be left to chance.

 To achieve this, Melbourne Girls Grammar promotes a progressive, contemporary community of practice committed to providing personalised high quality curriculum, wellbeing and co-curricular programs that enable lifelong learning for every student. We are future focused and committed to inspiring our Grammarians and equipping them with the values, knowledge and skills to be ready to make their mark on the world.

![Image 1](https://cdn.mggs.vic.edu.au/app/uploads/2019/02/03120807/Toni-Meath-Preferred-wen-150x150.jpg)
Dr Toni Meath, Principal

[Read more from Toni](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/about-us/principals-welcome)

[Vision](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de0b)

Melbourne Girls Grammar aspires to develop ethical women of action. Through a focus on learning, research and innovation, we will be recognised by our own community, the national and international community as a leading school in girls’ education.

[Mission](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de1b)

In the pursuit of our vision, Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the provision of an exceptional education for girls with an emphasis on strong Christian values, high expectations, creativity and academic challenge.

Within a supportive and positive learning environment, girls will discover their passion and build their capacities for action and influence.

[Values](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de21)

*   Integrity

*   Compassion

*   Courage

*   Self-discipline

Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the principles of a liberal democracy. To learn more, view our [Statement of Democratic Principles](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/statement-of-democratic-principles).

[](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/envisioning-the-future)

[### Envisioning the Future In 2020 Melbourne Girls Grammar launched to the School community a vision for a future that sees the empowerment of young women to take action, to embrace chal

messages.content:
Title: Welcome to DTBV - Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)

URL Source: https://www.dtbv.org.au/

Markdown Content:
[![Image 1: Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/themes/dtbv-bootstrap/img/dtbv-logo-nav.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/ "Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)")

*   [Home](https://dtbv.org.au/)
*   [About](https://dtbv.org.au/about/)
*   [Discover](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)
*   [For Medical Practitioners](https://dtbv.org.au/dtbv-tissue-grafts/)
*   [News & Events](https://dtbv.org.au/news-events/)
*   [Contact us](https://dtbv.org.au/contact-us/)

![Image 2: Donor Tissue Bank of Victoria (DTBV)](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/themes/dtbv-bootstrap/img/dtbv-logo.png)

[![Image 3](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Homepage-Banner-4-1040x300.png)](https://dtbv.org.au/donatelife-week-2025-27-july-to-3-august-2025/)

### Learn more

## How Can I Donate Skin?

In Australia, skin can only be donated from deceased donors.

You can register your wish to be a tissue donor in Australia on the DonateLife website: [www.donatelife.gov.au](http://www.donatelife.gov.au/).

It is also important to tell your family members your wishes as they will be asked to help facilitate donation at that time

## Become a Donor

[![Image 4: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_161208692-cropped-sml-LAPTOP.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/how-do-i-become-a-donor/)

Find out how you can register your wish to be considered for tissue donation...

## About Tissue Donation

[![Image 5: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162629372-Cropped-sml-BABY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/)

Tissue donation can enhance and even save people's lives. Find out more...

## Reasons to Donate

[![Image 6: DTBV](https://dtbv.org.au/wp-content/uploads/2013/12/shutterstock_162697553-cropped-sml-GRANNY.jpg)](https://dtbv.org.au/discover/why-donate/)

There are many reasons to become a tissue donor. Find out more...

messages.content:
Title: Home - Freshwater Place

URL Source: https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## THERE'S NOTHING LIKE IT

![Image 1: FWP Logo White](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/FWP-Logo-White-1.png)

## OUR ETHOS

![Image 2: Paint Splash 2](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_2.png)

A PLACE TO COME HOME

Freshwater Place truly embodies the essence of our symbolic place of home-coming. Not only does it boast an unrivaled location, but it also offers a distinctive and exceptional living experience. Residents of Freshwater Place enjoy the advantages of inner city living while relishing in a fulfilling and enriching lifestyle. The commitment to quality and the continual investment in maintaining the highest living standards for owners and residents further enhance the appeal of this remarkable place.

![Image 3: Skyscrapers](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-01.jpg)

## THE RESIDENCES

![Image 4: The Residences](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_1.png)

ENDURING STYLE AND QUALITY

Designed by renowned architect Bates Smart, the residences at Freshwater Place define timeless sophistication and style, without compromising on everyday practicality.

![Image 5: Living Room Area](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-02.jpg)

![Image 6: Skyscraper](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-04b.jpg)

## HEALTH & WELLNESS

![Image 7: Paint Splash 4](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_4.png)

RESORT-STYLE AMENITIES FOR OPTIMAL WELLBEING

We believe that health and wellness are the well-spring of a life well lived. With pools, gyms and a private garden nested on the 10th floor, Freshwater Place provides a full suite of amenities for relaxation, rejuvenation and fitness.

![Image 8](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-04.jpg)

![Image 9: Indoor Pool](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-05-1.jpg)

## SERVICES & SECURITY

![Image 10: Paint Splash 2](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_2.png)

RESIDENT-FIRST HOSPITALITY

Life at Freshwater Place is characterised by tranquility, hospitality, and convenience. It is often described as a sanctuary nestled in the vibrant heart of Melbourne. Our dedicated and experienced concierge team is available round-the-clock, guaranteeing a secure environment and providing prompt assistance to residents whenever needed.

![Image 11](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/p-home-freshwaterplace-06d.jpg)

## OUR LOCATION

![Image 12: The Residences](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-paintsplash_1.png)

PRIME RIVERFRONT LIVING AT SOUTHBANK

Our location is truly unique right on the Yarra at the junction of Southgate, Crown, the CBD and South Melbourne, with access to Melbourne’s iconic landmarks and transportation hubs in minutes.

![Image 13](https://www.freshwaterplace.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/p-home-freshwaterplace-08.jpg)

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF COUNTRY

Freshwater Place stands on land that was an ancestral river crossing point and meeting place. We respectfully acknowledge the Traditional Owners of the land – the Wurundjeri and Bunurong peoples of the Eastern Kulin – and their connection to land and water. We pay our respect to their Elders, past, present and emerging.

The official website content for Freshwater Place matches the database information about its location and amenities. It highlights Freshwater Place as a prime riverfront living location at Southbank, right on the Yarra River, close to Southgate, Crown, the CBD, and South Melbourne. The website emphasizes the resort-style amenities available, including pools, gyms, and a private garden, which aligns with the database mention of great facilities like a gym, pool, spa, sauna, and outdoor BBQ areas. The website also mentions 24/7 concierge services ensuring security and assistance, reflecting a high standard of living.

If you want, I can also check the official website for Belgian Beer Cafe or assist you with anything else.

messages.content:
Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

The official website of Belgian Beer Cafe states that they are open every day from 12pm until late for lunch, dinner, or drinks. This matches the database opening hours which show they are open daily from 12:00 with closing times ranging from 23:00 to 01:00 depending on the day of the week. The website and database information are consistent regarding their opening hours.

messages.content:
Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

The official website of Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne mentions the following relevant details:

- They offer an extensive selection of beers including classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons.
- They serve lunch, dinner, and drinks, and are open every day from 12pm until late.
- They have dedicated areas for gatherings such as birthday parties, going-away parties, promotions, and large family gatherings.
- They can cater for up to 300 people for cocktail parties with customizable menus and finger-food platters.
- They can cater sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.
- They also cater corporate events and meetings.

What stood out the most was the staff. Super friendly, energetic, and you can tell they work really well together. Even though it was busy, service was fast and everyone stayed cheerful, which made the whole place feel lively and welcoming.

🔷 Food

🔹 Bacon & Gluten Free Toast with Avocado
I swapped the waffle for gluten free toast with avocado. The bacon was very good, cooked just right. The blueberry sauce was also delicious. The sweetness of the blueberries and the creaminess of the avocado balanced the saltiness of the bacon nicely. Together with the toast, it was a well balanced combination.

🔹 Big Brekkie Platter with Cauliflower Rice
I added cauliflower rice to the big brekkie platter. Overall, it was quite good and satisfying.

🔹 Chocolate Milk
A classic chocolate milk, smooth and rich in flavour.

messages.content:
Title: Home | Baci Restaurant

URL Source: https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/

Published Time: Sun, 22 Mar 2026 03:04:04 GMT

Markdown Content:
![Image 1: ALL FOOD LOWERR scaled](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/ALL-FOOD-LOWERR-scaled.jpg.bv_resized_desktop.jpg.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

#### Food

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of spices to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

#### Food

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of species to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

### Testimonials

![Image 2: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“The service is great (especially Chris Pino) and the food is awesome. My kids love Baci so much and had breakfast, lunch, and dinner here. Highly recommended..“

[Alex Chan](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108151142278049465033/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAV)

![Image 3: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“The food is presented super nicely!

 The team is super friendly!

 Very clean and well presented!

 I would definitely come back to this place.“

[Stefania](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108169331616745335758?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiHgpS_0frnAhUVheYKHQcyCFUQvvQBegQIARAq)

![Image 4: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“Had a great experience, meals are well priced for the quality and quantity you receive. Ordered a Chicken Parmigiana and the Salmon and both of these dishes where great! Will come back again..“

[Kourken Ghazarian](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100396214542574320429/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAj)

![Image 5: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“Thought we would have a night out when we dropped into Baci for dinner and a sweet treat.

Service was fantastic and the food was second to none.I would recommend if you want something on the go as the food was served quickly.Top-quality place with so many desserts to choose from“

## Dine in and Takeaway menu

[![Image 6: Risotto FB](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Risotto-FB.png.bv_resized_desktop.png.bv.webp?bv_host=www.bacirestaurant.com.au)](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/dinner-menu-baci/)

[![Image 7: chicken burger](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/burger-FB.jpg.bv_resized_desktop.jpg.bv.webp?bv_host=www.bacirestaurant.com.au)](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/lunch-menu/)

[![Image 8: brunch 2](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/ham-and-eggs-FB.jpg.bv_resized_deskto

Baci offers classic Italian cuisine with a modern blend of spices, serving authentic Italian food. They have a specialty coffee shop that serves cakes and light bites around the clock, making it suitable for a brief break stop. The place also offers a variety of drinks including cocktails, traditional spirits, beers, and ciders.

Customer testimonials praise the great service, well-presented food, and quick serving times, highlighting it as a top-quality place with many dessert options.

Based on this, Baci's food and coffee offerings are indeed suitable for a brief break stop. Would you like assistance with anything else?

#### Food

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of spices to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of spices to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

“The service is great (especially Chris Pino) and the food is awesome. My kids love Baci so much and had breakfast, lunch, and dinner here. Highly recommended..“

 The team is super friendly!

 Very clean and well presented!

 I would definitely come back to this place.“

[Stefania](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108169331616745335758?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiHgpS_0frnAhUVheYKHQcyCFUQvvQBegQIARAq)

Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

The official website of Belgian Beer Cafe confirms the following:

- Mussels: They proudly partner with Yumbah Sea Farms to deliver the highest quality mussels to their guests.
- Dinner Service: They are open every day from 12pm until late, serving lunch, dinner, or drinks.
- Dedicated Area for Groups: They offer dedicated areas for gatherings such as birthday parties, going-away parties, promotions, large family gatherings, and corporate events. They can cater for up to 300 people for cocktail parties and up to 120 guests for sit-down lunch or dinner.

Would you like to proceed with checking availability or any other information?

Title: Melbourne Girls Grammar | Empowering Tomorrow’s Women

URL Source: https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/

Markdown Content:
# Melbourne Girls Grammar | Empowering Tomorrow’s Women

*   [Privacy Policy](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/privacy-policy)
*   [Accessibility](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/accessibility)

Search for: 

## Connect with us Connect

*   [](https://www.instagram.com/melbournegirlsgrammar/)
*   [](https://www.facebook.com/MelbourneGirlsGrammar/?fref=ts)
*   [](https://twitter.com/MGGS_SouthYarra?lang=en)
*   [](https://www.linkedin.com/company/1013594?trk=tyah&trkInfo=clickedVertical%3Acompany%2CclickedEntityId%3A1013594%2Cidx%3A2-1-2%2CtarId%3A1479877279235%2Ctas%3Amelbourne%20girls%20grammar)

close

More

Retirement of Dr Toni Meath

Announcement from the Chair of Council.

[Read More >](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/news/the-retirement-of-dr-toni-meath)

## Discover Melbourne Girls Grammar

Melbourne Girls Grammar is a place where challenge and choice create opportunities for every student to discover who she is meant to be.

A leader in girls’ education since 1893, our School has built an outstanding reputation for excellence, enabling students to develop with confidence and independence.

World-class learning programs, state-of-the-art facilities and an extensive co-curricular program inspire each student to achieve their best in the classroom and beyond.

To educate is to make an intervention into the lives of others. When we intervene, we do so with certain assumptions about the value of what we are doing and why. Building students' capacity for future readiness is a moral-ethical learning endeavour and one that cannot be left to chance.

 To achieve this, Melbourne Girls Grammar promotes a progressive, contemporary community of practice committed to providing personalised high quality curriculum, wellbeing and co-curricular programs that enable lifelong learning for every student. We are future focused and committed to inspiring our Grammarians and equipping them with the values, knowledge and skills to be ready to make their mark on the world.

![Image 1](https://cdn.mggs.vic.edu.au/app/uploads/2019/02/03120807/Toni-Meath-Preferred-wen-150x150.jpg)
Dr Toni Meath, Principal

[Read more from Toni](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/about-us/principals-welcome)

[Vision](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de0b)

Melbourne Girls Grammar aspires to develop ethical women of action. Through a focus on learning, research and innovation, we will be recognised by our own community, the national and international community as a leading school in girls’ education.

[Mission](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de1b)

In the pursuit of our vision, Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the provision of an exceptional education for girls with an emphasis on strong Christian values, high expectations, creativity and academic challenge.

Within a supportive and positive learning environment, girls will discover their passion and build their capacities for action and influence.

[Values](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de21)

*   Integrity

*   Compassion

*   Courage

*   Self-discipline

Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the principles of a liberal democracy. To learn more, view our [Statement of Democratic Principles](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/statement-of-democratic-principles).

[](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/envisioning-the-future)

[### Envisioning the Future In 2020 Melbourne Girls Grammar launched to the School community a vision for a future that sees the empowerment of young women to take action, to embrace chal

## Discover Melbourne Girls Grammar

Melbourne Girls Grammar is a place where challenge and choice create opportunities for every student to discover who she is meant to be.

A leader in girls’ education since 1893, our School has built an outstanding reputation for excellence, enabling students to develop with confidence and independence.

World-class learning programs, state-of-the-art facilities and an extensive co-curricular program inspire each student to achieve their best in the classroom and beyond.

To educate is to make an intervention into the lives of others. When we intervene, we do so with certain assumptions about the value of what we are doing and why. Building students' capacity for future readiness is a moral-ethical learning endeavour and one that cannot be left to chance.

 To achieve this, Melbourne Girls Grammar promotes a progressive, contemporary community of practice committed to providing personalised high quality curriculum, wellbeing and co-curricular programs that enable lifelong learning for every student. We are future focused and committed to inspiring our Grammarians and equipping them with the values, knowledge and skills to be ready to make their mark on the world.

![Image 1](https://cdn.mggs.vic.edu.au/app/uploads/2019/02/03120807/Toni-Meath-Preferred-wen-150x150.jpg)
Dr Toni Meath, Principal

[Read more from Toni](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/about-us/principals-welcome)

[Vision](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de0b)

Melbourne Girls Grammar aspires to develop ethical women of action. Through a focus on learning, research and innovation, we will be recognised by our own community, the national and international community as a leading school in girls’ education.

[Mission](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de1b)

In the pursuit of our vision, Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the provision of an exceptional education for girls with an emphasis on strong Christian values, high expectations, creativity and academic challenge.

Within a supportive and positive learning environment, girls will discover their passion and build their capacities for action and influence.

[Values](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/#collapse_69bfa65f8de21)

*   Integrity

*   Compassion

*   Courage

*   Self-discipline

Melbourne Girls Grammar is committed to the principles of a liberal democracy. To learn more, view our [Statement of Democratic Principles](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/statement-of-democratic-principles).

[](https://www.mggs.vic.edu.au/envisioning-the-future)

[### Envisioning the Future In 2020 Melbourne Girls Grammar launched to the School community a vision for a future that sees the empowerment of young women to take action, to embrace chal

Markdown Content:
![Image 1: ALL FOOD LOWERR scaled](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/ALL-FOOD-LOWERR-scaled.jpg.bv_resized_desktop.jpg.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

#### Food

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of spices to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

#### Food

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of species to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

### Testimonials

![Image 2: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“The service is great (especially Chris Pino) and the food is awesome. My kids love Baci so much and had breakfast, lunch, and dinner here. Highly recommended..“

[Alex Chan](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108151142278049465033/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAV)

![Image 3: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“The food is presented super nicely!

 The team is super friendly!

 Very clean and well presented!

 I would definitely come back to this place.“

[Stefania](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108169331616745335758?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiHgpS_0frnAhUVheYKHQcyCFUQvvQBegQIARAq)

![Image 4: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“Had a great experience, meals are well priced for the quality and quantity you receive. Ordered a Chicken Parmigiana and the Salmon and both of these dishes where great! Will come back again..“

[Kourken Ghazarian](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100396214542574320429/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAj)

![Image 5: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“Thought we would have a night out when we dropped into Baci for dinner and a sweet treat.

Service was fantastic and the food was second to none.I would recommend if you want something on the go as the food was served quickly.Top-quality place with so many desserts to choose from“

## Dine in and Takeaway menu

[![Image 6: Risotto FB](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Risotto-FB.png.bv_resized_desktop.png.bv.webp?bv_host=www.bacirestaurant.com.au)](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/dinner-menu-baci/)

[![Image 8: brunch 2](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/ham-and-eggs-FB.jpg.bv_resized_deskto

Baci:
- Opening hours: Open 24 hours every day (database and website consistent).
- Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible parking and entrance (database).
- Website states it is a speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock, suitable for quick stops.

Brick Lane Melbourne:
- Opening hours: 7:30 AM to 2:30 PM on weekdays, 8:00 AM to 2:30 PM on weekends (database).
- Accessibility: No wheelchair accessible parking or entrance (database).
- Website offers a book-a-table option and visual menu but no mention of 24-hour service or quick bites.

Based on accessibility and opening hours, Baci is the better quick stop for a rushed business traveler due to its 24-hour operation and wheelchair accessibility. Brick Lane Melbourne has limited hours and lacks wheelchair accessibility, making it less convenient for quick, flexible visits.

Would you like help with anything else?

Along the driving route between Freshwater Place and South Yarra Presbyterian Church, I found three cafes:

1. Distrikt Press Cafe (9 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC 3006) - Rating: 5.0 with 2 reviews. It is wheelchair accessible, good for children, serves vegetarian food, and is currently open. It has a relaxed atmosphere and excellent food.

2. Belgian Beer Cafe (5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC 3006) - Rating: 4.3 with 1775 reviews. It allows dogs, has outdoor seating, and is also wheelchair accessible. It is known for a wide beer selection and good food.

3. Darling Cafe (2 Darling St, South Yarra VIC 3141) - Rating: 4.3 with 809 reviews. It serves vegetarian food, has outdoor seating, and is wheelchair accessible. It is currently closed but highly recommended for its coffee and food.

The best option for a quick coffee break based on rating and reviews is Distrikt Press Cafe. Would you like to know more details or check availability for a specific time?

What stood out the most was the staff. Super friendly, energetic, and you can tell they work really well together. Even though it was busy, service was fast and everyone stayed cheerful, which made the whole place feel lively and welcoming.

Great vibe, good food, and a solid team. Would happily come back for brunch again💕", "time": "2026-01-31T00:52:54.280941395Z"}, {"rating": "5.0", "text": "Brick Lane Melbourne

🔹 Atmosphere
Located down a small laneway near the main road, you need to walk in to find it, so it might take a moment to spot. It’s about a 7 minute walk from the State Library of Victoria, which makes it quite convenient. The indoor seating is slightly crowded, but the overall vibe is cosy. The restroom is fairly clean.

🔷 Food

🔹 Bacon & Gluten Free Toast with Avocado
I swapped the waffle for gluten free toast with avocado. The bacon was very good, cooked just right. The blueberry sauce was also delicious. The sweetness of the blueberries and the creaminess of the avocado balanced the saltiness of the bacon nicely. Together with the toast, it was a well balanced combination.

🔹 Big Brekkie Platter with Cauliflower Rice
I added cauliflower rice to the big brekkie platter. Overall, it was quite good and satisfying.

🔹 Chocolate Milk
A classic chocolate milk, smooth and rich in flavour.

🔸 Summary
A breakfast spot I would return to. So far, what I’ve ordered has been a safe choice. It is perfect for a team lunch on a work day or a weekend brunch outing. There's outside seating available as well, for single diners and small groups.
The open kitchen adds to the open vibe of the place. There's choctops available too to fulfil your sweet tooth cravings!
It was the first time for me eating savoury waffles and omg they were so good! They are happy to eliminate the poached eggs from the dish if you want to. I ordered the pistachio chocolate bingsu, and it was incredible 💕 rich pistachio spread, smooth chocolate sauce, crunchy kadaif, and soft, fluffy shaved ice that all came together perfectly.

I also tried the strawberry hotteok, which ended up being my personal favorite. The warm, chewy hotteok with the bright strawberry filling was such a good balance.

For drinks, I had the ice Biscoff latte and the injeolmi latte. Both were sweet, comforting, and great alongside the desserts.

Plus, the café stays open till late, which makes it an easy go-to for night hangouts or a late dessert craving.

Here's a comparison of the three cafes along your route:

1. Brick Lane Melbourne
   - Rating: 4.4 (highest among the three)
   - Address: 33 Guildford Ln, Melbourne VIC 3000
   - Atmosphere: Cozy, lively, friendly staff, good for children
   - Accessibility: No wheelchair accessible parking or entrance
   - Amenities: Vegetarian food, no outdoor seating, no dogs allowed
   - Reviews highlight great food, friendly staff, and a welcoming vibe
   - Noted to be slightly off the main road, so might require a short walk to find

2. Baci
   - Rating: 3.1 (lowest among the three)
   - Address: Crown Riverwalk, Crown Melbourne, 21/8 Whiteman St, Southbank VIC 3006
   - Atmosphere: Nice indoor and outdoor seating by the river, convenient location
   - Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible parking and entrance
   - Amenities: Vegetarian food, outdoor seating, no dogs allowed, good for children
   - Reviews mention great coffee, good service, but some cleanliness concerns

3. Cafe Andiamo
   - Rating: 3.7
   - Address: 36-38 Degraves St, Melbourne VIC 3000
   - Atmosphere: Authentic laneway feel, good coffee and food, efficient staff
   - Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible entrance, no wheelchair parking
   - Amenities: Vegetarian food, outdoor seating, no dogs allowed, not good for children
   - Reviews praise the food and coffee, with a nice atmosphere

For a nervous first-time driver wanting the least chance of getting lost, Brick Lane Melbourne might be slightly less ideal due to its location down a small laneway that might take a moment to spot. Baci and Cafe Andiamo are more straightforward to find along the route.

Considering the balance of rating, accessibility, and ease of finding the place, Cafe Andiamo could be a good choice with a decent rating, good atmosphere, and easier to spot on Degraves St.

messages.content:
Title: Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne | Belgian Beer in Melbourne | 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank VIC, Australia

URL Source: http://www.belgianbeercafemelbourne.com.au/

Markdown Content:
## Welcome to Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

At Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne - a family-owned and operated business - we pride ourselves on offering an extensive selection of beers from around the world. Our tap beer and bottle menu includes classic Belgian styles like Trappist, Dubbels, Tripels, and Saisons, as well as local and other international brews. We also serve an excellent selection of wines and cocktails, so there is definitely something for everyone. Come in for lunch, dinner, or just drinks. We're open 7 days a week.

Happenings

Functions / Events

## FUNCTIONS & EVENTS

Turn Event Stress into Event Success

![Image 1: Beer with friends](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_d1a4d1b0ab554de7ba2e5e9a3579c012~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_132,y_0,w_336,h_336/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/100BB2FF-703F-40A2-B3E8-52395DA69654_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### GATHERINGS

A birthday party? A going-away party? A promotion party? A large family gathering?Need a dedicated area? Need food and drinks? We can do it all!

![Image 2: Friendly get togethers](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_bebf171022ca4d33aa3fc0ea2e17b178~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_171,y_0,w_683,h_683/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/64A49FDC-D7EF-4C9C-A48C-1AE15BF7E5E2_edi.jpg)

### COCKTAIL PARTY

Whether you have in mind a cocktail soirée with a completely customisable menu of delectable canapés or an open tab session with a variety of delicious finger-food platters, we can cater for up to 300 people and suit every occasion.

![Image 3: Corporate lunches or Dinners](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f2751d8304cb4678aeb5ab64fe14a3bb~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_420,y_0,w_1080,h_1080/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/F6DACF4E-DF2C-4F91-AB67-BC7324A72849.jpeg)

### DINNER PARTIES

If you need to feed a group of hungry colleagues for lunch in a hurry, talk to us about pre-ordering. It's stress-free and inexpensive.

Otherwise, we can cater a sit-down lunch or dinner for up to 120 guests with a wide assortment of menus.

![Image 4: Corporate Gatherings](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_60a0917398054a7ab43aae0ce489e1df~mv2.jpeg/v1/crop/x_74,y_0,w_163,h_163/fill/w_121,h_121,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/28518312-839F-409C-BB2D-9F994D04E61A_4_5005_c.jpeg)

### Corporate

Whether you're organising a meeting, a symposium, a company, a dinner, or cocktail party, we'll help you get it right.

When you need to set up an industry networking gathering or nail a presentation to a large group of potential clients: let us assist you in fine-tuning it and hitting the right note.

### Function Enquiry Form

![Image 5: Fresh Yumbah Mussels](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_962a8024b6a54993940d5394e8812676~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/FreshMussels.png)

[![Image 6: Yumbah Aquiculture is the best](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_87376b93bc7c4b81904276730688cdb2~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Yumbah.jpg)](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/)

Belgian Beer Café is proud to partner with [Yumbah Sea Farms](https://yumbah.com/company/locations/) to deliver the highest quality mussels to our guests.

![Image 7: Stella is an awesome Belgian Beer](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/b09fa5_f93a7f25067f44db82afefab7442328e~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_412,h_296,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Stella_Promo_edited.jpg)

## Location & Hours

Belgian Beer Cafe Melbourne

is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne.

We are open every day from

12pm until late. Come and visit us for lunch, dinner, or drinks.

Follow us on [Untappd](https://untappd.com/v/belgian-beer-cafe

From the official website of Belgian Beer Cafe, here are three source-backed details:

1. The cafe is family-owned and operated, offering an extensive selection of beers, wines, and cocktails, and is open 7 days a week for lunch, dinner, or drinks.
2. They host functions and events, including birthday parties, with dedicated areas and customizable food and drink options, making it suitable for a child's birthday outing.
3. The cafe is located at 5 Riverside Quay, Southbank, Melbourne, and is open every day from 12 pm until late.

The corn waffle was crispy on the outside, soft inside, with a nice natural sweetness — not heavy at all. The omelette was light, fluffy, and cooked perfectly. Simple menu items but done really well.

What stood out the most was the staff. Super friendly, energetic, and you can tell they work really well together. Even though it was busy, service was fast and everyone stayed cheerful, which made the whole place feel lively and welcoming.

Great vibe, good food, and a solid team. Would happily come back for brunch again💕", "time": "2026-01-31T00:52:54.280941395Z"}, {"rating": "5.0", "text": "Brick Lane Melbourne

🔹 Atmosphere
Located down a small laneway near the main road, you need to walk in to find it, so it might take a moment to spot. It’s about a 7 minute walk from the State Library of Victoria, which makes it quite convenient. The indoor seating is slightly crowded, but the overall vibe is cosy. The restroom is fairly clean.

🔷 Food

🔹 Bacon & Gluten Free Toast with Avocado
I swapped the waffle for gluten free toast with avocado. The bacon was very good, cooked just right. The blueberry sauce was also delicious. The sweetness of the blueberries and the creaminess of the avocado balanced the saltiness of the bacon nicely. Together with the toast, it was a well balanced combination.

🔹 Big Brekkie Platter with Cauliflower Rice
I added cauliflower rice to the big brekkie platter. Overall, it was quite good and satisfying.

🔹 Chocolate Milk
A classic chocolate milk, smooth and rich in flavour.

![Image 1: ALL FOOD LOWERR scaled](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/ALL-FOOD-LOWERR-scaled.jpg.bv_resized_desktop.jpg.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

#### Food

Enjoy classic Italian flavours combined with a modern blend of spices to bring you authentic Italian cuisine.

#### Cakes & Coffee

Speciality coffee shop serving cakes and light bites around the clock.

#### Drinks

Delicious cocktails, traditional spirits and a wide range of beers and ciders make Baci the perfect spot to spend your evenings on a date or to celebrate with family and friends.

#### Drinks

### Testimonials

![Image 2: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“The service is great (especially Chris Pino) and the food is awesome. My kids love Baci so much and had breakfast, lunch, and dinner here. Highly recommended..“

[Alex Chan](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108151142278049465033/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAV)

![Image 3: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“The food is presented super nicely!

 The team is super friendly!

 Very clean and well presented!

 I would definitely come back to this place.“

[Stefania](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108169331616745335758?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiHgpS_0frnAhUVheYKHQcyCFUQvvQBegQIARAq)

![Image 4: stars](https://www.bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/al_opt_content/IMAGE/bacirestaurant.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/stars.png.bv.webp?bv_host=bacirestaurant.com.au)

“Had a great experience, meals are well priced for the quality and quantity you receive. Ordered a Chicken Parmigiana and the Salmon and both of these dishes where great! Will come back again..“

[Kourken Ghazarian](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100396214542574320429/reviews?hl=en-AU&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwj7xLXX3M_jAhXPfH0KHXCLCfoQvvQBegQIARAj)

“Thought we would have a night out when we dropped into Baci for dinner and a sweet treat.

Service was fantastic and the food was second to none.I would recommend if you want something on the go as the food was served quickly.Top-quality place with so many desserts to choose from“
